case_title: MAURICE FAKHOURY VS. TASHO NICOLOPULOS et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FAKHOURY, MAURICE AS TO DEFENDANT NICOLOPULOS, TASHO DOES 1-10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $40.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF FAKHOURY, MAURICE
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR REQ. FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FAKHOURY, MAURICE
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT NICOLOPULOS, TASHO
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FAKHOURY, MAURICE ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT NICOLOPULOS, TASHO
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT NICOLOPULOS, TASHO
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FAKHOURY, MAURICE
ORDER GRANTING PLAINTIFF'S EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR JUDGMENT

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FAKHOURY, MAURICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NICOLOPULOS, TASHO THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 505 CORBETT AVENUE, APARTMENT #3, SAN FRANCISCO $3,218.05 RENT, $376.85 ATTORNEY FEES, $743.18 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,338.08, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOC
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FILED BY PLAINTIFF FAKHOURY, MAURICE
